query: Colgate-Palmolive job posting (artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI OR LLM OR data scientist)

results.title: AI-Integrated Design Consultant (Graphic Design / Packaging / Branding) - Remote Job Leads
highlights:
AI-Integrated Design Consultant (Graphic Design / Packaging / Branding) - Remote Job Leads
...
The AI-Integrated Design Consultant role at Colgate-Palmolive invites a creative visionary to join the Global Design team. Ideal candidates are proficient in harnessing Generative AI tools alongside traditional design workflows to accelerate ideation and produce high-quality, on-brand visual assets. This part-time freelance engagement runs from July to September, offering a short-term opportunity for experienced designers who thrive on innovation and rapid iteration.
...
Colgate-Palmolive is a leading
...
consumer products company dedicated to improving health and wellness for people and their pets. With over 34,000 team members worldwide, the company delivers essential products in oral care, personal care, home care, and pet nutrition across more than 200 countries and territories. Colgate-Palmolive is committed to innovation, sustainability, and reimagining a healthier future for all.
...
As an AI-Integrated Design Consultant, you will deconstruct client briefs and brand objectives into actionable visual concepts, developing sophisticated text and image prompts to fuel rapid ideation. You will explore dozens of stylistic variations in hours rather than days, critically evaluating outputs to select the most on-brand directions. Using Adobe Creative Suite, you will composite, retouch, and refine AI-generated assets, layering typography and branding elements in Illustrator and InDesign to create polished layouts. You will present initial comps for feedback, iterate through hybrid workflows, and scale approved concepts into deliverables such as static ads, social media content, and motion graphics support.
...
Applicants should have a strong portfolio demonstrating a hybrid process that showcases initial AI prompt architecture, resulting AI-generated visuals, and final polished deliverables. Expert fluency with Generative AI platforms and advanced prompt engineering techniques is essential, along with mastery of Adobe Creative Suite. Experience in consumer packaging design, end-to-end execution, and effective communication skills are required. Candidates must supply their own software and hardware and work autonomously in a global context. Occasional connectivity to a New York City office is a plus but not mandatory.
...
This freelance, remote-friendly position offers the chance to work on high-impact projects for a respected global brand, leveraging cutting-edge AI tools to push the boundaries of design. The short-term engagement provides flexibility while enabling designers to contribute to a collaborative, innovative environment.
...
Interested candidates can submit their proposals through the Braintrust platform, where you keep 100% of your earnings and earn token rewards for participation. Be prepared to share your portfolio showcasing AI-integrated design workflows.

results.title: Colgate-Palmolive Hiring Analyst , Business Analytics | Jobformore
highlights:
Colgate-Palmolive Hiring Analyst , Business Analytics | Jobformore
...
# Analyst , Business Analytics
...
Colgate-Palmolive
...
Mumbai 2-3 Years ₹8–14 LPA Posted today 💼 Full Time
...
## Job Description
...
### Brief introduction – Role Summary/Purpose:
...
The candidate will support the Colgate Business Teams in Marketing and Insights functions across the globe. The role requires a person to have understanding of Internal & external data (Syndicated Market Data, Point of Sales etc.) and ability to provide Insights based Services & solutions.
...
The Person should have abilities to build insights from large External and Internal datasets. An Analytical problem solver with focus on Business Intelligence and Insights. Ability to work in a collaborative and customer focused (proactive and Responsive to Business needs) . Excellent Written and verbal communication skills
...
### Responsibilities:
...
- Build Insights and Competition Intelligence solutions
- Work on Connected data solutions, building automated insights and reports
- Work on different datasets & systems (Marketing, Customers, Product masters, Finance, Digital, Point of Sales) and link the business rationales to develop & support Insights and Analytics
...
- Build & support standard Business evaluation Trackers & Dashboards per agreed to SLAs and respond to ad hoc requests for reporting and first level analysis
- Data Quality and Sanity is essential so validating the data, trackers and dashboards is prime
- Communicate and coordinate with Divisions and subsidiaries as part of investigation and resolution of discrepancies
...
- You will engage with Business teams in Corporate, Divisions, Hub (Cluster of Countries) and countries to understand business requirements and collaborate on solutions
...
- Work with Internal Analytics teams & Information technology teams to learn and advance on developing sustainable and standard reporting trackers
- Partner with external data vendors to ensure timely data availability with appropriate data sanity
...
- With constantly evolving business environment, you will find out different ways to tackle the business problem through Analytical solutions (Data transformation, Data Visualization, Data Insights)
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Graduate in Engineering/Sciences/Statistics , MBA
- Experience with third-party data i.e. syndicated market data (Nielsen, Kantar, IRI) Point of Sales, etc.
- Minimum 2-3 years experience working in Data Insights / Analytics role
- Should have worked in a client facing / stakeholder management role to understand business needs and draw hypothesis
- Working knowledge of consumer packaged goods industry
- Knowledge of Data Transformation tools – R/Python, Snowflake
- Working knowledge of visualization tools like Tableau, DOMO, Lookerstudio, Sigma
- Ability to Read , Analyze and Visualize data
- Effective Verbal & Written Communication for Business engagement
- Excellent presentation/visualization skills
...
### Preferred Qualifications :
...
- Created/worked on automated Insights solution
- Worked on Competition Intelligence solutions
- Understanding of Colgate’s processes, and tools supporting analytics (for internal candidates)
- Willingness and ability to experiment with new tools and techniques
- Good facilitation and project management skills
...
Education: BE/BTech/MS/MSc/MBA
...
Colgate-Palmolive is a global consumer products company best known for its oral care, personal care, and home care brands. The company holds a leading position in the consumer packaged goods industry, supported by its wide international reach, strong brand portfolio, and long-standing market presence. Colgate-Palmolive is recognized for its category leadership, operational strength, and commitment to innovation and customer trust.

wouldn’t have met otherwise.

I inherited a cloud data transformation project that I completed & took to launch, became a founding member of the AI Champions, coded a web based platform for AI enablement, facilitated a Gemini training for 1,000+ members of our North America division, led a global sprint project to make an AI assistant, and so much more. None of this has ever been in my job description, but Colgate’s people-centric approach to continuous development created the fertile ground for me to grow and flourish.

The award honors a patented artificial intelligence algorithm that fuels a predictive modeling tool which empowers scientists to digitally test new formulation ideas based on data from thousands of already-tested Colgate formulations, ingredient profiles, and other information like product trends. The algorithm brings together the collective intelligence of Colgate scientists and reputable third-party sources to predict how well new formulas are likely to perform across criteria including stability, biodegradability, and consumer appeal. This approach will enable Colgate to more rapidly meet the evolving needs of its billions of global consumers and also meet Colgate's environmental sustainability goals. Show less

Colgate-Palmolive is a global household and consumer products company that is reimagining a healthier future for all people, their pets, and the planet. Colgate-Palmolive Company employs 14,969 people (+2.7% YoY, +823 people) and has an annual revenue of $20.4B, founded in 1953. results.title: Colgate-Palmolive Hiring Research Trainees | Apply for Global Science & Systems | Freshers
highlights:
# Colgate-Palmolive Hiring Research Trainees | Apply for Global Science & Systems | Freshers
...
## Research Trainee – Global Science & Systems
...
Colgate-Palmolive, one of the world’s leading consumer products companies, has announced openings for the position of Research Trainee – Global Science & Systems at its Global Technology Center (GTC) in Mumbai, Maharashtra. This is an excellent opportunity for M.Pharm, M.Sc (Chemistry/Biology), and Cosmetic Technology postgraduates looking to build careers in product lifecycle management, data governance, SAP systems, and research administration within a global R&D environment.
...
The position is offered as a 2-year fixed-term contractual role and provides hands-on exposure to proprietary data management, SAP administration, quality systems, and cross-functional collaboration across global R&D teams.
...
## Job Details
...
| Particulars | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Position | Research Trainee – Global Science & Systems |
| Company | Colgate-Palmolive |
| Job Location | Mumbai, Maharashtra, India |
| Employment Type | Fixed-Term Contract (2 Years) |
| Department | Global Science & Systems |
| Travel Requirement | No Travel |
| Application Mode | Online |
...
At its India Global Technology Center in Mumbai, Colgate manages critical product data, research systems, and product lifecycle processes that support innovation across international markets.
...
## Key Responsibilities
...
Selected candidates will be responsible for:
...
- Conducting first-level review and governance of Colgate raw material and recipe data within defined turnaround timelines.
- Managing master data related to proprietary formulations and ingredients.
- Providing security access to SAP systems, including PDP, DMS, PPM, and LIMS platforms.
...
- Routing Human Use Protocols (HUP) through SAP-DMS and supporting administrative processes in Veeva.
...
- Forwarding Adverse Events (AE) from HUP studies to Pharmacovigilance teams for evaluation.
...
- Delivering technical and procedural support to more than 2,000 English-speaking users through emails, phone calls, and instant messaging.
...
- Supporting product data management (PDM) cleansing activities, recipe obsolescence processes, and database searches.
...
## Eligibility Criteria
...
Candidates must possess any of the following postgraduate qualifications:
...
- M.Pharm
- M.Sc in Chemistry
- M.Sc in Biology
- Postgraduate Degree in Cosmetic Technology
...
### Preferred Skills
...
- Strong fundamentals in chemistry and scientific principles
- Exposure to SAP database management and system administration concepts
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace applications
- Excellent computer aptitude and analytical skills
- Effective communication and problem-solving abilities
...
## What You Will Learn
...
During the traineeship, candidates will gain exposure to:
...
### Product Lifecycle Management (PLM)
...
- Management of proprietary raw material and recipe databases
- Data governance and master data administration
...
### SAP System Administration
...
- Security role assignment and user access governance
- Due diligence processes in enterprise systems
...
### Cross-Functional R&D Exposure
...
- Analytical Sciences
- Research & Innovation
- Microbiology
- Implementation and Support Teams
...
### Operational Excellence
...
- Problem-solving methodologies
- Process improvement initiatives
- Working in high-performing global teams
...
### Quality and Safety
...
## Why Join Colgate-Palmolive?
...
- Opportunity to work with a globally recognized FMCG leader
- Exposure to enterprise systems including SAP, Veeva, DMS, and LIMS
- Structured learning and mentoring programs
- Extensive technical and soft skills development
- Global R&D exposure and cross-functional collaboration
- Experience in product data management and governance processes
- Strong foundation for careers in pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and consumer healthcare industries

results.title: Andrew Naundorff
highlights:
Analytics Engineer at [Colgate-Palmolive](https://www.linkedin.com/company/colgate-palmolive)
...
I’m an Analytics Engineer building robust, scalable data systems that power scientific discovery and innovation. With experience across the analytics engineering stack — from dbt modeling and Snowflake optimization to CI/CD automation and API development — I specialize in transforming raw lab and manufacturing data into high-quality, trusted datasets. I bridge the gap between R&D scientists, data engineers, and business stakeholders by translating complex requirements into maintainable data products. I’ve led efforts to design AI-driven ontologies, accelerate predictive model pipelines, and foster data literacy across analytics teams. Core Skills: SQL • Python • dbt • Snowflake • GitHub • Airflow • Airbyte • GCP • FastAPI • Data Modeling • CI/CD • AI-assisted data engineering Always open to connecting on modern data stack practices, analytics automation, or innovative R&D data solutions.
...
● Own the team’s Analytics GitHub repository (15 contributors), overseeing package upgrades, CI/CD workflows, and code reviews to ensure clean and reliable deployments. ● Design, build, and maintain 40+ scalable dbt models and ELT pipelines integrating SAP manufacturing and LIMS sample data into a unified Snowflake warehouse powering R&D analytics. ● Leverage AI tools to construct a semantic ontology for LabVantage data, improving consistency, discoverability, and cross-domain alignment. ● Implement automated dbt testing, documentation, and lineage tracking to strengthen data quality and reusability across analytics teams. ● Collaborate closely with IT and R&D scientists to enhance an internal analytics platform; present updates and roadmap improvements at company-wide meetings to drive adoption and gather feedback. Show less
...
● Developed and deployed FastAPI data services to deliver analytical datasets and automate model refresh processes for analytics and data science teams. ● Partnered with R&D scientists and data scientists to build 30+ predictive models for product stability across multiple categories. ● Engineered optimized pipelines that reduced predictive model load times by 90%, improving deployment efficiency and reliability. ● Acted as the data translator between R&D and technical teams to align analytical capabilities with business needs. ● Mentored and upskilled junior analysts in SQL and Python best practices, fostering data literacy and automation culture. Show less
...

results.title: Mark Mintel
highlights:
Analytics Engineer at Colgate-
...
Engineer at [
...
I’m an open-minded, creative and driven chemical engineer working as an analytics engineer at Colgate-Palmolive. As I got deeper into my ChemE curriculum, I relied more heavily on programming to solve the complex systems I was working on. This sparked a passion for programming and its applications in an engineering setting. I believe by combining chemical engineering with programmatic approaches, like machine learning, we can innovate more robust solutions to the complex problems in our modern world. I am constantly pushing myself to learn new approaches to problem solving through techniques like supervised/unsupervised machine learning, cluster analysis, image analysis and efficient algorithm design. I started my career path as a musical instrument repair technician. I got an AAS degree in Band Instrument Repair Technology and worked as a technician from 2013 to 2019. Instrument repair sparked my passion for engineering with the complex mechanisms in woodwind instruments, diagnostics with electric instruments/amplifiers and part design/fabrication for both custom modifications and replacement parts. Although I still have a passion for this trade, I found myself seeking more from my career. This led me to pursue a path in chemical engineering, which combined my love of engineering and passion for sustainability. In May of 2023 I graduated Magna Cum Laude from Rutgers University with a B.S. in Chemical Engineering. Through this journey, I discovered a newfound passion for programming and the endless potential that it has in regards to complex problem solving. During my last two years at Rutgers, I spent any free time I had taking online courses on data science and data engineering as well as working on personal projects to solidify my understanding of these skills. During this time, I worked as an intern at Colgate-Palmolive as a lab technician in the Rheology department. Here, I was able to put some of these skills to more practical use by developing software to aid in characterizing attributes of different products. More specifically, I developed programs to assess sensory attributes of products through image analysis as well as extracting rheological parameters of complex fluids through image analysis.

results.title: Associate Scientist at Colgate Palmolive | Chemical Sciences Jobs
highlights:
## Associate Scientist at Colgate Palmolive | Chemical Sciences Jobs
...
Looking to build a rewarding career in Chemical Sciences Jobs with a globally recognized organization? Colgate Palmolive Careers has announced an exciting opportunity for an Associate Scientist at its Mumbai location. This role is ideal for professionals with experience in product development, formulation science, pilot plant operations, and research & development. Join a leading FMCG company and contribute to innovative products that reach millions of consumers worldwide while advancing your scientific career.
...
Colgate Palmolive Careers is seeking an Associate Scientist to join its India Global Technology Center (GTC) in Mumbai. The selected candidate will lead end-to-end product development initiatives, including new product launches, relaunches, and margin improvement programs. This Chemical Sciences Jobs opportunity involves formulation development, pilot plant operations
...
, consumer testing, technology transfer, and regulatory compliance. The role also requires collaboration with global teams and cross-functional departments to transform scientific innovations into successful consumer products.
...
- Job Title: Associate Scientist
- Job Location: Mumbai
- Job Number: #173875 –
...
- Lead End-to-End Product Innovation: Independently spearhead all product development initiatives—including new product launches, relaunches, and margin improvement programs—from initial conceptualization to ground-level implementation.
...
- Drive Operational & Scale-Up Excellence: Oversee pilot plant operations, formulation development, consumer test sampling, and technology transfer, ensuring 100% compliance with quality, safety, and EHS guidelines.
...
- Leverage Data & Design Optimization: Utilize statistical approaches to experimental design (DoE) and data analytics to maximize learning with minimal resources, proactively identifying business opportunities and solving technical challenges.
...
- Translate Insights into Claims: Partner with consumer insights to translate complex technical attributes into simple, impactful, and consumer-relevant benefits that engage shoppers and elevate brand equity.
...
- Collaborate Globally & Cross-Functionally: Build strong internal and external networks, partnering closely with Marketing, Supply Chain, Procurement, and global GTC networks to ensure agile, cost-effective, and rapid speed-to-market.
...
- Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Pharmaceutical Sciences, or a related technical field.
...
- Experience: Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in product development, formulation, or R&D within a laboratory and pilot plant environment.
...
- Technical Mastery: Proven track record of independently leading product development projects from lab-scale formulation through to manufacturing scale-up and technology transfer.
...
- Methodology: Demonstrated experience utilizing statistical tools and experimental design (DoE) for formulation and aging studies.
...
- Industry Experience: Prior experience in the Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) or Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) industry, specifically within Personal Care or Home Care.
...
- Agility & Continuous Improvement: A proven mindset of agility with the ability to respond quickly to changing consumer demands and a track record of improving existing R&D processes.
...
-functional collaboration skills
...
This Associate Scientist opportunity through Colgate Palmolive Careers is an excellent choice for professionals seeking impactful Chemical Sciences Jobs in the FMCG sector. The role offers exposure to global product innovation, advanced formulation science, technology transfer, and cross-functional collaboration. If you are passionate about research, product development, and creating innovative consumer solutions, this position can provide a strong platform for long-term career growth in a world-renowned organization.
